description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden bookcase with a visibly aged and rustic appearance. The bookcase features four shelves, each filled with a variety of old, worn books, some stacked upright and others leaning or piled haphazardly. The wood is dark, rough, and uneven, with visible grain, knots, and signs of wear, giving it a handcrafted, antique look. On top of the bookcase are several glass bottles and jars, some with stoppers and others open, suggesting use in a workshop or study. Metal hooks are attached to the sides, possibly for hanging small items or tools. The overall structure appears sturdy but slightly warped, adding to its vintage character.
description: A tall, rustic wooden bookcase filled with old books and topped with glass bottles, featuring a weathered, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full shelves of books, glass bottles on top, and the rough, dark wood texture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the narrow profile, visible metal hooks, and the uneven, aged wood surface.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the arrangement of books, glassware on top, and the warped, rustic frame.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the slim silhouette, side hooks, and the distressed wood grain.
